objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=25)
- adx(period=19)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 15
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 3.0
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (3.0x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy aims to identify and enter long positions when the price breaks out of an oversold region (represented by the Donchian Channel) with a high ADX value. Short positions are initiated when the price breaks out of an overbought region with a high ADX value.
Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.
Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.
